name: Recall from the private library
query: Find the soccer goals in my videos
expected_behavior: If the namespace is unknown, calls list_unique_ids first to discover it
Calls search_videos with search_type BY_CLIP and the chosen unique_id
Does NOT use search_public_videos or search_web_videos (this is the private library)
Optionally calls get_audio_transcription or get_video_caption to add detail on a videoNo
Summarizes results for a human and never dumps raw JSON
success_criteria: Returns ranked clips with videoNo plus start/end timestamps
Every reported result cites its videoNo and time
If list_unique_ids returns empty, reports there is no indexed data instead of guessing a namespace
